summary: Completed testing of hourly_rate removal from the platform. All hourly_rate references have been successfully removed from the codebase. Backend API tests: 7 passed, 2 skipped (auth limitations). Migration script executed to remove hourly_rate from existing database documents.
seed_data_creation: None - Migration script removed hourly_rate from 7 existing teacher documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hourly_rate references have been removed. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/admin/finance/payroll returns commission_tier instead of hourly_rate/total_hours, 2) GET /api/teachers returns teachers without hourly_rate field, 3) Frontend ProfileManagement has no hourly rate input, 4) FinancialReports shows Tier column instead of Hourly Rate/Hours, 5) BrowseTeachers has no Rate: RM X/hour text, 6) BookClass shows '4 credits' instead of RM {hourly_rate}. Migration script at /app/backend/migrations/remove_hourly_rate.py was executed to clean up database.

feature_verification.backend_payroll_no_hourly_rate: VERIFIED - GET /api/admin/finance/payroll returns commission_tier, no hourly_rate or total_hours
feature_verification.backend_teachers_no_hourly_rate: VERIFIED - GET /api/teachers returns teachers without hourly_rate field (after migration)
feature_verification.backend_teacher_profile_no_hourly_rate: VERIFIED - Teacher model doesn't include hourly_rate
feature_verification.frontend_ProfileManagement_no_hourly_rat: VERIFIED - No hourly rate input field in code
feature_verification.frontend_FinancialReports_tier_column: VERIFIED - Shows Tier column instead of Hourly Rate/Hours
feature_verification.frontend_TeacherApprovals_no_hourly_rate: VERIFIED - No hourly rate display in code
feature_verification.frontend_BrowseTeachers_no_rate: VERIFIED - No 'Rate: RM X/hour' text in code

migration_executed.description: Removed hourly_rate field from all teacher documents in database
